announcements.title: Welcome to WorkUp
announcements.summary: Thanks for downloading WorkUp! Track your workouts, nutrition, and body stats, and watch your progress unfold.

sections.title: Log your first entry
sections.body: Tap "Start Workout" on the home page, or record today's weight and height to build your data foundation.

sections.title: Announcements keep coming
sections.body: Version updates, events, and important notices will show up here. Check back from time to time.

announcements.title: Community Guidelines
announcements.summary: To keep the experience great for everyone, please follow our community guidelines.

sections.title: Respect each other
sections.body: When sharing your results, stay friendly and respectful. Avoid offensive or inappropriate content.

sections.title: Protect personal data
sections.body: Please do not share other people's personal information in public content. Let's keep this a safe space.

announcements.title: Account Security Tips
announcements.summary: Review your sign-in methods regularly to keep your training data safe.

sections.title: Link multiple sign-in methods
sections.body: In Account Settings, link Google or Apple sign-in so you're never locked out if one method fails.

sections.title: Back up regularly
sections.body: Turn on cloud backup so you can fully restore your records even when switching devices.

announcements.title: Charts Upgraded
announcements.summary: Weight trend and training volume charts have been redesigned — faster and clearer.

sections.title: New weight trend chart
sections.body: Switch between weekly / monthly / yearly views, and compare your goal line against actual data. Below are the new trend chart and volume chart:

sections.title: Faster loading
sections.body: We rewrote the chart rendering so it stays smooth and zoomable even with large datasets.

announcements.title: Nutrition Module Update
announcements.summary: Added daily nutrition goals and a richer food database.

sections.title: Custom daily nutrition goals
sections.body: Adjust your daily targets for calories, protein, carbs, and fat based on your training goals.

sections.title: Richer food database
sections.body: Hundreds of new common foods and brands make logging meals easier than ever.

announcements.title: Summer 30-Day Challenge
announcements.summary: Train for 30 days straight to unlock an exclusive badge and rewards!

sections.title: How it works
sections.body: During the event, completing at least one workout on any given day counts toward that day's goal. Keep your streak going.

sections.title: Rewards
sections.body: Finish all 30 days to earn a limited-edition badge and enter the prize draw. Details on the event page.

announcements.title: Refer a Friend, Get Rewards
announcements.summary: Invite friends to WorkUp and you both get a gift.

sections.title: How to refer
sections.body: Share your unique invite link with friends from the Settings page.

sections.title: Reward delivery
sections.body: Once your friend signs up and completes their first workout, you'll both get a reward notification.
